title: [epic] ELECROW ThinkNode M7 PoE gateway support
description: ELECROW ThinkNode M7: ESP32-S3 + LR1110 + PoE + WiFi/BLE. Indoor border router/gateway. PoE = single cable deployment. Shares LR1110 driver (iw00) with T1000-E/M3, ESP32-S3 platform with Heltec V3. Need: pin mapping, PoE controller ID, board definition. 915MHz.
